Command-line argument parsing

Imports

cliparse, blockfmt, oswrap, hlogger, hexceptions, hdebug_misc, base_errors, colorstring, lexcast, clformat, htemplates, hseq_mapping, htext_algo, hparse_base, hstring_algo, halgorithm, hpprint

Types

CliCmdTree = object
  desc* {...}{.requiresinit.}: CliDesc
  head* {...}{.requiresinit.}: CliOpt
  args*: seq[CliOpt]
  mainIdx*: int              ## Cmd tree entry index in the main input (to compute
                             ## origin information later)
  case kind*: CliOptKind
  of coCommand:
      subnodes*: seq[CliCmdTree]

  of coDashedKinds:
      subPaths*: Table[string, CliCmdTree]

  else:
      nil

  
CliError = object of CatchableError
  origin*: CliOrigin
  got* {...}{.requiresinit.}: CliOpt
  case isDesc*: bool
  of true:
      desc* {...}{.requiresinit.}: CliDesc

  of false:
      check* {...}{.requiresinit.}: CliCheck

  kind* {...}{.requiresinit.}: CliErrorKind

CliCheck = ref object
  allowedRepeat*: Slice[int] ## Allowed range of value repetitions
  case kind*: CliCheckKind
  of cckIsInRange:
      valueRange*: Slice[float64]

  of cckIsInSet:
      values*: seq[CliValue]

  of cckAndCheck, cckOrCheck:
      subChecks*: seq[CliCheck]

  of cckUser:
      userCheck*: proc (value: CliValue): Option[CliError]

  of cckAllOf, cckNoneOf, cckAnyOf:
      itemCheck*: CliCheck

  else:
      nil

  
CliOrigin = object
Where particular CLI value came from (configuration file, default value or it was passed directled as an argument) 
CliCompletion = object
  value*: string
  doc*: CliDoc

CliDoc = object
  docBrief*: string
  docFull*: string

CliDocTree = object
  level*: Table[string, CliDocTree]
  doc*: CliDoc

CliDesc = ref object
  name*: string
  altNames*: seq[string]
  defaultValue*: Option[string]
  defaultAsFlag*: Option[string]
  check*: CliCheck
  bracketSelectors: seq[string] ## Valid for `BracketFlag` and `BracketOpt`
  completeFor*: proc (): seq[CliCompletion]
  doc*: CliDoc
  varname*: string
  groupKind*: CliOptKind
  aliasof*: Option[CliOpt]
  case kind*: CliOptKind
  of coCommand:
      options*: seq[CliDesc]
      arguments*: seq[CliDesc]
      subcommands*: seq[CliDesc]

  of coArgument:
      required*: bool

  of coFlag .. coBracketOpt:
      subKeys*: seq[CliDesc] ## For `Dot*` fields and options, contains
                             ## list of possible continuations - `--cc.exe` and `--cc.ld` will
                             ## be represented as `--cc` option with `--exe` and `--ld`
                             ## suboptions
      selector*: Option[CliCheck]

  of coSpecial:
      nil

  
CliValueKind = enum
  cvkString, cvkInt, cvkFloat, cvkFsEntry, ## Absolute/relative (link) to filesystem file/directory
  cvkBool, cvkRecord, ## For converting values passed via multiple long-path
                       ## switches like `--clang.exe=emcc --clang.linkerexe=emcc`
  cvkUnparse,               ## Peg/regex-based unparsers
  cvkCommand
CliValue = ref object
  origin*: CliOrigin
  desc* {...}{.requiresinit.}: CliDesc
  case kind*: CliValueKind
  of cvkCommand:
      name*: string
      positional*: seq[CliValue]
      options*: Table[string, CliValue]

  of cvkUnparse:
      matches: seq[string]

  of cvkString:
      strVal*: string

  of cvkInt:
      intVal*: int

  of cvkFloat:
      floatVal*: float

  of cvkBool:
      boolVal*: bool

  of cvkFsEntry:
      fsEntryVal*: FsEntry

  of cvkRecord:
      recValues*: Table[string, CliValue]

  
CliApp = object
  author*: string
  name*: string
  url*: Url
  doc*: CliDoc
  configPaths*: seq[FsEntry]
  rootCmd*: CliDesc
  exitCodes*: seq[CliExitCode]
  case isSemVer*: bool
  of true:
      semVersion*: tuple[major, minor, patch: int]

  of false:
      strVersion*: string

  
CliHelpModes = enum
  chmOff = "off", chmOn = "on", chmJson = "json", chmCompact = "compact",
  chmVerbose = "verbose", chmCmd = "cmd"

Procs

proc add(desc: var CliDesc; other: CliDesc) {...}{.raises: [UnexpectedKindError],
    tags: [].}
proc cliValue(val: string; doc: string): CliValue {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc checkValues(values: openArray[(string, string)]): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc orCheck(or1, or2: CliCheck; other: varargs[CliCheck]): CliCheck {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc aliasedCheck(): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc repeatCheck(minRepeat, maxRepeat: int): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc noCheck(): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc andCheck(and1, and2: CliCheck; other: varargs[CliCheck]): CliCheck {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc anyOfCheck(sub: CliCheck; repeated: Slice[int]): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc allOfCheck(sub: CliCheck; repeated: Slice[int]): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc acceptAllCheck(): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc check(kind: CliCheckKind): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc opt(name, doc: string; default: string = "";
         values: openArray[(string, string)] = @[]; docFull: string = "";
         alt: seq[string] = @[]; defaultAsFlag: string = "";
         groupKind: CliOptKind = coOpt; varname: string = name;
         maxRepeat: int = 1; aliasof: CliOpt = CliOpt();
         selector: CliCheck = nil; check: CliCheck = nil): CliDesc {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc docTree(doc: string; sub: openArray[(string, CliDocTree)]): CliDocTree {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc docTree(doc: string): CliDocTree {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc cliCheckFor[T](value: typedesc[seq[T]]): CliCheck
proc cliCheckFor(str: typedesc[string]): CliCheck
proc cliCheckFor(str: typedesc[int]): CliCheck
proc cliCheckFor[En: enum](en: typedesc[En]; docs: array[En, string]): CliCheck
proc getDefaultCliConfig(ignored: seq[string] = @[]): seq[CliDesc] {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc newCliApp(name: string; version: (int, int, int); author: string;
               docBrief: string; noDefault: seq[string] = @[];
               options: seq[CliDesc] = getDefaultCliConfig(noDefault)): CliApp {...}{.
    raises: [UnexpectedKindError], tags: [].}
proc exitException(code: CliExitValueRange; name: string; doc: string;
                   docFull: string = ""): CliExitCode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc fromCli[T](obj: var T; cli: CliValue)
proc exitWith(app: CliApp; ex: ref Exception; logger: HLogger;
              doQuit: bool = true) {...}{.raises: [Exception, ValueError, IOError,
    KeyError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect].}
proc arg(name: string; doc: string; required: bool = true;
         check: CliCheck = nil; docFull: string = ""): CliDesc {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc strVal(tree: CliCmdTree): string {...}{.raises: [UnexpectedKindError], tags: [].}
proc name(tree: CliCmdTree): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc select(tree: CliCmdTree): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc structureSplit(opts: seq[CliOpt]; desc: CliDesc; errors): CliCmdTree {...}{.raises: [
    IOError, OSError, ParseFail, UnexpectedKindError, Exception, ImplementError,
    ImplementKindError], tags: [RootEffect].}
Convert unstructured sequence of CLI commands/options into structured unchecked tree. 
proc toCliValue(tree: CliCmdTree; errors): CliValue {...}{.raises: [
    ImplementKindError, UnexpectedKindError, ImplementError, OSError, ValueError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect].}
Convert unchecked CLI tree into typed values, without executing checkers. 
proc mergeConfigs(tree: CliCmdTree; configs: seq[CliValue]; errors) {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
proc acceptParams(app: var CliApp; params: seq[string] = paramStrs()): tuple[
    ok: CliValue, errors: seq[CliError]] {...}{.raises: [Exception,
    UnexpectedKindError, IOError, OSError, ParseFail, ImplementError,
    ImplementKindError, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect, ReadDirEffect].}
proc `$`(val: CliValue): string {...}{.raises: [ImplementKindError], tags: [].}
proc helpStr(app: CliApp): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError, Exception, KeyError,
    ImplementKindError], tags: [RootEffect].}
proc helpStr(err: CliError): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError, Exception, KeyError,
    ImplementKindError], tags: [RootEffect].}

Funcs

func treeRepr(tree: CliCmdTree): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError, ImplementError],
    tags: [].}
func add(app: var CliApp; cmd: CliDesc) {...}{.raises: [UnexpectedKindError],
    tags: [].}
func root(app: CliApp): CliDesc {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func root(app: var CliApp): var CliDesc {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func checkFileReadable(): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func checkDirExists(): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func checkDirCreatable(): CliCheck {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func cliComplete(key, doc: string; docFull: string = ""): CliCompletion {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func cmd(name, docBrief: string; subparts: openArray[CliDesc] = @[];
         alt: seq[string] = @[]): CliDesc {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func flag(name, doc: string; aliasof: CliOpt = CliOpt()): CliDesc {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
func add(app: var CliApp; code: CliExitCode) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func add(tree: var CliCmdTree; other: CliCmdTree; pathLevel: int = 0) {...}{.
    raises: [UnexpectedKindError], tags: [].}
func get(tree: CliValue; name: string; doRaise: bool = true): CliValue {...}{.
    raises: [KeyError, ImplementError, ImplementKindError], tags: [].}
func len(tree: CliCmdTree): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `==`(str: string; val: CliValue): bool {...}{.raises: [ImplementKindError],
    tags: [].}
func version(app: CliApp): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}

Iterators

iterator items(tree: CliCmdTree): CliCmdTree {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
iterator items(desc: CliDesc): CliDesc {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

Macros

macro raisesAsExit(app: var CliApp; mainProc: typed;
                   exceptions: static[openArray[(string, (int, string))]]): untyped
macro runMain(app: CliApp; mainProc: typed; logger: HLogger; doQuit: bool;
              args: varargs[untyped]): untyped

Exports

CliParseConfig, splitFlag, key, defaulCliParseConfig, parseOpt, CliSpecialKind, cliParse, parseCliOpts, splitCliArgs, CliAddKind, needsValue, value, CliOptKind, parseArgument, parseFlag, parseSpecial, coOptionKinds, canAddValue, CliFailKind, CliOpt, scanpFull, parseCommand, CliErrPolicy, coDashedKinds, cliParse, $, coFlagKinds, cliParse, cliParse, scanpFull, classifyCliArg, CliFail, coBracketKinds, cliParse, HLogEvent, runShell, execShell, loggerErrConverter, closeScope, fail, fatal, runShell, prepareText, trace, trace, logScope, HLogger, err, linesAround, wait, thisScope, warn, fatal, dedent, newTermLogger, info, execShell, log, openScope, err, logStackTrace, done, debug, done, fail, wait, success, prepareDump, notice, check, debug, warn, notice, dump, loggerOutConverter, indent, log, findLineRange, lineTextAround, info, openScope, HLogLevel, log, success, changeDir, waitFor, logLines, pdump, toMapArray, toMapArray

Made with Nim. Generated: 2021-06-30 09:28:35 UTC
